title: Prince Edward Island – Provincial corporation tax - Canada.ca
content:
## Prince Edward Island – Provincial corporation tax
Changes to the Prince Edward Island higher rate of corporation income tax and business limit have been announced. See what's new for Prince Edward Island corporations .
What's new for corporations
The lower rate of Prince Edward Island income tax is 1% .
This rate applies to taxable income earned in Prince Edward Island that qualifies for the federal small business deduction.
The higher rate of income tax is 16% . This rate applies to taxable income earned in Prince Edward Island that does not qualify for the federal small business deduction.
For more information, see Dual tax rates .
You can use Schedule 322 , Prince Edward Island Corporation Tax Calculation , to help you calculate the Prince Edward Island tax before the credits are applied. You do not have to file it with your return. See the schedule for more details.
On line 210 of Schedule 5 , Tax Calculation Supplementary – Corporations , enter the amount of tax calculated.

## Claiming the credits
Prince Edward Island offers two tax credits. Details can be found in the following pages and their associated schedules:
- Corporate investment tax credit

## Forms and publications
- Schedule 322, Prince Edward Island Corporation Tax Calculation
- Schedule 5, Tax Calculation Supplementary – Corporations
- Prince Edward Island (provincial site)
